title: Successful Admin Login
description: Verify that an admin user can log in with valid email and password credentials, establishing a secure session with a JWT stored in httpOnly cookies.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin login page
Input a valid registered email and corresponding password
Click the login button
Check that login is successful and a JWT token is set in an httpOnly cookie
Verify redirection to the protected admin dashboard page

title: Login Failure with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify that the system prevents login when an invalid email or password is supplied, showing an error message without creating a session.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin login page
Input an invalid or unregistered email with any password
Click the login button
Verify login is rejected with appropriate error message
Verify no JWT httpOnly cookie is set and user remains on login page

title: JWT Session Expiry and Logout
description: Verify that the JWT session properly expires after configured duration and user is redirected to login upon session expiry or manual logout.

steps.description: Log in successfully as an admin user
Wait until JWT token expires or manually trigger logout via logout API or button
Verify the session cookie is invalidated or deleted
Verify redirection to the admin login page
Attempt to access a protected admin route after logout/session expiry
Verify access is denied and redirected to login page

title: Access Control for Admin Routes
description: Ensure all admin dashboard routes are protected and only accessible by authenticated admin users using JWT middleware protections.

steps.description: Attempt to navigate to various admin routes (journals, submissions, reviews, authors, settings) without authentication
Verify redirection to admin login page
Log in successfully and navigate to the same admin routes
Verify routes load successfully with dashboard content visible

title: Admin Dashboard Journal Listing and Filtering
description: Verify that admins can view a complete, paginated list of journals and apply filters to narrow results.

steps.description: Log in as an admin user
Navigate to the journals management page
Verify the full list of journals is displayed with correct details
Use filter controls to filter journals by status, category, or other attributes
Verify the journal list updates correctly and reflects filter criteria

title: Create and Edit Journal Entries
description: Ensure admins can create new journal entries and edit existing ones via form inputs, with validation and API interaction.

steps.description: Access journals management page as logged-in admin
Click on 'Add New Journal' button
Fill in all required journal fields with valid data
Submit the journal creation form
Verify new journal is created and appears in listing
Select an existing journal and open edit form
Modify data fields and submit updates
Verify journal details are updated correctly in the list and database

title: Data Migration Integrity from PostgreSQL to MySQL
description: Validate the migration process correctly transfers all data from PostgreSQL to MySQL preserving data types, relationships, and indices.

steps.description: Perform data migration using provided migration tools and guides
Verify total counts of records match in source PostgreSQL and target MySQL databases
Validate UUID to BIGINT conversions and array to JSON transformations in migrated data
Verify all foreign keys, indices, and constraints are properly recreated in MySQL

title: Synchronization with External OJS MySQL Database
description: Check that periodic synchronization via automated scripts and cron jobs correctly imports journal and article metadata from OJS without errors.

steps.description: Verify connectivity and read-only permissions using provided MySQL user for external OJS database
Run synchronization script manually
Confirm new or updated journal and submission data is synced into DigitoPub's MySQL database
Verify synchronization runs successfully via scheduled cron job and logs no critical errors
Validate data consistency between OJS source and local database after sync

title: API Authentication Routes Edge Cases
description: Confirm authentication API routes correctly handle invalid inputs, expired sessions, and logout with proper status codes and feedback messages.

steps.description: Send login request with missing or invalid email/password fields
Verify response returns 400 Bad Request with descriptive error message
Send login request with valid credentials but invalid password
Verify response returns 401 Unauthorized
Send request to session info endpoint with expired or missing JWT token
Verify response returns 401 Unauthorized with session expired message
Send logout request and verify cookie invalidation
Verify successful logout response and session cookie removal

title: Admin Dashboard UI Responsiveness and Theme Toggle
description: Verify admin dashboard UI is responsive across desktop and mobile viewports and that dark/light theme toggle functions correctly.

steps.description: Log in as admin and open the dashboard
Resize browser window to various widths simulating desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
Verify layout adjusts appropriately with sidebar, header, content resizing
Use the theme toggle to switch between dark and light modes
Verify theme changes globally and persists across page reloads

title: Testsprite Widget Automated Form Interaction
description: Validate the embedded Testsprite widget correctly runs automated form filling, input simulation, and UI interaction tests without failure.

steps.description: Load a page containing the Testsprite widget
Start an automated test scenario with the widget simulating user input on forms
Verify the widget executes test steps properly, filling inputs and clicking buttons
Confirm that no errors occur and expected UI responses are triggered

title: Database Connection Verification Scripts
description: Test database connection verification scripts for both the main application and the OJS external database run successfully and provide expected operational statistics.

steps.description: Run connection verification script for main application MySQL database
Confirm successful connection with expected connection statistics printed
Run connection verification script for external OJS MySQL database using read-only user
Confirm successful connection with expected statistics and read-only access confirmed

title: Admin Messages System CRUD Operations
description: Verify admins can view, create, edit, and delete messages in the admin messaging interface with proper validation and UI updates.

steps.description: Access admin messages page after successful login
View list of existing messages paginated
Create a new message with valid content and submit
Verify new message appears in the list
Edit an existing message and save changes
Confirm updated message content is shown
Delete a message and confirm removal
Verify message no longer appears in the list

title: FAQ Management - Add, Edit, Delete FAQ Entries
description: Verify full CRUD operations for FAQs including validation of required fields and UI feedback on the FAQs management page.

steps.description: Navigate to admin FAQ management page
Add a new FAQ with question and answer fields filled
Verify new FAQ is displayed in the list
Select an existing FAQ to edit, modify text, and save
Confirm updated FAQ data is rendered correctly
Delete an FAQ and confirm removal from the UI
Verify FAQ entry no longer appears

title: Authors Management - Profile Update and List Filtering
description: Validate ability to view, filter, add, and edit author profiles with form validations and proper database updates.

steps.description: Access the authors management page as logged-in admin
Apply filtering criteria such as name or affiliation to the author list
Verify filtered authors list displays correctly
Create a new author profile by filling required fields
Confirm newly added author appears in the list
Edit an existing author profile and submit changes
Verify author information updates are reflected in the UI
